variable: CP19 DP CELL WATER LEVEL (4-20mA = 140-1100 mm)
CP19 SUPERHEATER 2 STEAM OUTLET PRESSURE (4-20mA = 0-63 Bar)
CP17 FEEDWATER TO DESUPERHEATER CONTROL VALVE ACTUAL POSITION (4-20mA = 0-100%)
CP17 PRESSURE REDUCING DESUPERHEATER VALVE HP STEAM TO FW TANK (4-20mA = 0-100%
CP17 DEAERATOR PRESSURE TRANSDUCER (4-20mA = xx Bar)
CP17 TREATED WATER TANK LEVEL TRANSDUCER (4-20mA = 0-100%)

name: Build STEAM SQL Insert
func:
// Timestamp for SQL Server
var ts = new Date().toISOString();

// Extract joined payload
var p = msg.payload;

// Build SQL INSERT for MSSQL bulk mode
msg.payload =
    "INSERT INTO STEAM (" +
    "Time_stamp, " +
    "STEAM_DRUM_PRESSURE, STEAM_DRUM_LEVEL, STEAM_OUTLET_FLOW, STEAM_OUTLET_TEMP, " +
    "SUPER_HEATER_OUTLET_PRESSURE, TEMPERATURE_BEFORE_DESUPERHEATER, TEMPERATURE_AFTER_DESUPERHEATER, " +
    "DESUPERHEATER_VALVE_SETPOINT, DESUPERHEATER_VALVE_POSITION, COOLING_LOOP_FLOW_TEMP, " +
    "COOLING_LOOP_RETURN_TEMP, AMBIENT_TEMPERATURE, CP17_2CV07_POSITION, DEAERATOR_PRESSURE, " +
    "TREATED_WATER_TANK_LEVEL" +
    ") VALUES ('" +
    ts + "', '" +
    p.STEAM_DRUM_PRESSURE + "', '" +
    p.STEAM_DRUM_LEVEL + "', '" +
    p.STEAM_OUTLET_FLOW + "', '" +
    p.STEAM_OUTLET_TEMP + "', '" +
    p.SUPER_HEATER_OUTLET_PRESSURE + "', '" +
    p.TEMPERATURE_BEFORE_DESUPERHEATER + "', '" +
    p.TEMPERATURE_AFTER_DESUPERHEATER + "', '" +
    p.DESUPERHEATER_VALVE_SETPOINT + "', '" +
    p.DESUPERHEATER_VALVE_POSITION + "', '" +
    p.COOLING_LOOP_FLOW_TEMP + "', '" +
    p.COOLING_LOOP_RETURN_TEMP + "', '" +
    p.AMBIENT_TEMPERATURE + "', '" +
    p.CP17_2CV07_POSITION + "', '" +
    p.DEAERATOR_PRESSURE + "', '" +
    p.TREATED_WATER_TANK_LEVEL +
    "')";

return msg;
